# FilaScope

> The world's most complete 3D printer filament comparison platform. FilaScope indexes 16,107 filaments from 55 brands with specs, real-time pricing from 39 retailers, 500+ verified HueForge TD values, and printer compatibility data.

> Last updated: 2026-03-31

## Unique Data

FilaScope is the only platform combining HueForge TD values (500+ verified TD values across 49+ brands), multi-regional live pricing (USD, CAD, EUR, GBP, AUD, JPY), and printer compatibility data in one database. Prices updated daily from 39 retailers.

## Data Coverage

- Filaments: 16,107 variants from 55 brands
- Printers: 155 models with full specs (271-field schema)
- HueForge TD values: 500+ filaments with verified TD values (the largest public database)
- Static pages: 5,101 prerendered pages (filaments, brands, printers, guides, colors)
- Material categories: 7 (PLA, PETG, ABS, TPU, ASA, Nylon, PC)
- Markets: US, Canada, EU, UK, Australia, Japan
- Currencies: USD, CAD, EUR, GBP, AUD, JPY

## Core Pages

- Homepage: https://filascope.com/
- Filament Database (16,107 products): https://filascope.com/filaments
- 3D Printer Database (155 printers): https://filascope.com/printers
- Brand Directory (55+ brands): https://filascope.com/brands
- HueForge TD Database (500+ verified TD values): https://filascope.com/hueforge-td-database
- Filament Deals: https://filascope.com/deals
- Comparison Tool: https://filascope.com/compare
- Color Finder (search filaments by hex color): https://filascope.com/colors
- Material Guide: https://filascope.com/materials
- FilaScore Rankings: https://filascope.com/rankings
- Printer Comparison Tool: https://filascope.com/printers/compare
- Material Comparison Tool: https://filascope.com/materials/compare
- Compatibility Matrix: https://filascope.com/compatibility-matrix
- Filament Temperature Chart: https://filascope.com/filament-temperature-chart
- Slicer Directory: https://filascope.com/slicer-directory

## HueForge TD Database

FilaScope maintains the largest public database of verified Transmission Distance (TD) values for HueForge 3D printing. TD values determine color accuracy in multi-filament prints.

- Search by brand, color, or TD value range
- Covers PLA, PETG, Silk, Matte, and specialty filaments
- Community-verified measurements
- Direct link: https://filascope.com/hueforge-td-database

## Filament Comparison Features

- Side-by-side spec comparison for up to 4 filaments
- Regional pricing in 6 currencies
- Printer compatibility matrix
- FilaScore™ quality rating algorithm
- HueForge TD values where available
- Affiliate links to 15+ retailers with live prices

## About FilaScope

FilaScope is an independent filament comparison platform for the 3D printing community. Not affiliated with any filament manufacturer. Revenue comes from affiliate partnerships.

Contact: Available through the website
